/wedding-photography-erode.title: Wedding Photographers in Erode | Doll Pictures
/wedding-photography-erode.description: Candid and cinematic wedding photography in Erode, with pre-wedding shoots, films, albums and personalized coverage across Tamil Nadu.
/wedding-photography-erode.heading: Wedding photography in Erode
/wedding-photography-erode.body: Cinematic wedding photography from our Erode studio — candid moments, crafted films and lasting albums for couples across Tamil Nadu.
/wedding-photography-erode.label: Weddings
/wedding-photography-erode.lead: From first look to last dance, we tell your wedding story with cinematic stills and films — rooted in Erode, ready to travel across Tamil Nadu.

sections.heading: Cinematic coverage for your day
paragraphs: DOLL PICTURES by Ramya Vignesh approaches every wedding as a visual story. We blend candid emotion with crafted portraits so your gallery feels like a film you can revisit for years.
Whether you are planning an intimate ceremony or a multi-day celebration, we plan coverage around your rituals, family moments and the quiet in-between frames that make the day yours.

sections.heading: What a wedding day with us feels like
paragraphs: Before the wedding we meet for a free consultation to understand your timeline, venues, preferred look and must-have moments. On the day, our team moves with the energy of the celebration — unobtrusive during rituals, intentional for portraits.
After delivery, you receive a curated preview followed by the full gallery and album options discussed at booking. Exact inclusions and turnaround are confirmed when you choose your package.

sections.heading: Erode studio, Tamil Nadu travel
paragraphs: Our studio is based at URT TOWERS on Perundurai Road in Erode. We regularly photograph weddings across Tamil Nadu, including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai, and can arrange destination coverage during consultation.
Share your venues and dates early so we can plan travel, second shooters if needed, and a timeline that protects both rituals and portraits.

faqs.question: Do you photograph weddings outside Erode?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are based in Erode and shoot weddings across Tamil Nadu — including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai. Destination celebrations can be arranged during consultation.

faqs.question: Do you offer pre-wedding shoots?
faqs.answer: Yes. Romantic pre-wedding sessions can be planned at a location you love, with styling guidance discussed in your free consultation.

faqs.question: How do we see packages and pricing?
faqs.answer: Compare options on our Packages page or ask during consultation. Exact inclusions and pricing are confirmed when you book — we do not list unverified figures here.

faqs.question: Is the first consultation free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Your first consultation is free so we can discuss story, look, budget and logistics before you commit.

/newborn-baby-photography-erode.title: Newborn Baby Photography in Erode | Doll Pictures
/newborn-baby-photography-erode.description: Safe, baby-friendly newborn sessions in the Erode studio with custom themes, gentle posing and professional editing — travel across Tamil Nadu available.
/newborn-baby-photography-erode.heading: Newborn baby photography in Erode
/newborn-baby-photography-erode.body: Gentle, baby-friendly newborn sessions in our Erode studio — custom themes, careful posing and soft editing for families across Tamil Nadu.
/newborn-baby-photography-erode.label: Newborn
/newborn-baby-photography-erode.lead: Welcome your baby with calm, carefully paced studio sessions designed around comfort, safety and timeless portraits.

sections.heading: Baby-first sessions
paragraphs: Newborn photography at DOLL PICTURES is paced for your baby — warm rooms, soft setups and breaks whenever they need them. We never rush a pose or force a look.
Parents stay close throughout. We guide gentle posing and wrap styles so every frame feels natural, tender and true to your family.

sections.heading: Themes, styling and delivery
paragraphs: Choose from custom studio themes or a simple, timeless look. We help with colour palettes and props that suit newborns, then edit with a soft cinematic finish.
Session length, image counts and album options depend on the package you select. We share a clear timeline at booking after your free consultation.

sections.heading: Studio in Erode, families across Tamil Nadu
paragraphs: Most newborn sessions happen in our Erode studio at URT TOWERS, Teachers Colony, Palayapalayam. Families also travel to us from Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore, Chennai and elsewhere in Tamil Nadu.
If a home or hospital-adjacent session is important for your baby, tell us during consultation so we can advise what is practical and comfortable.

faqs.question: When should we book a newborn session?
faqs.answer: Many families enquire during pregnancy or soon after birth so we can reserve a calm studio slot. Ideal timing depends on your baby — we will advise during consultation.

faqs.question: Is the studio baby-friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sessions are paced for newborns with soft setups, warmth and breaks as needed. Parents remain present throughout.

faqs.question: Do you only shoot in Erode?
faqs.answer: Our studio is in Erode, and we welcome families from across Tamil Nadu — including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai. Ask about travel options when you enquire.

faqs.question: How do we book?
faqs.answer: Use our booking form or WhatsApp with your preferred dates. Your first consultation is free.

/maternity-photography-erode.title: Maternity Photoshoot in Erode | Doll Pictures
/maternity-photography-erode.description: Personalized maternity photography in Erode with studio and outdoor concepts, styling guidance and family portraits — available across Tamil Nadu.
/maternity-photography-erode.heading: Maternity photography in Erode
/maternity-photography-erode.body: Personalized maternity sessions in Erode — studio and outdoor concepts, styling guidance and portraits that celebrate this chapter.
/maternity-photography-erode.label: Maternity
/maternity-photography-erode.lead: Celebrate the wait with tender, timeless maternity portraits — crafted in our Erode studio or at a location that feels like you.

sections.heading: Portraits for this chapter
paragraphs: Maternity photography with DOLL PICTURES is personal, not rushed. We plan lighting, wardrobe guidance and posing that flatter and feel comfortable through every trimester stage you choose to photograph.
Partner and sibling portraits can be included so the gallery reflects your whole family, not only a single look.

sections.heading: Studio or outdoor concepts
paragraphs: Shoot in our Erode studio with curated setups, or outdoors at a location we plan together. We discuss colour, fabric and mood in your free consultation so the session feels cohesive.
After the shoot you receive edited images on the timeline shared at booking. Album and print options can be added when you select a package.

sections.heading: Serving mothers across Tamil Nadu
paragraphs: We are based in Erode and regularly welcome expectant parents from Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore, Chennai and across Tamil Nadu. Travel for outdoor or destination maternity sessions can be planned when logistics allow.
Book while you still have energy for a calm session — many clients schedule in the second or early third trimester, but we will advise what fits your pregnancy.

faqs.question: When is the best time for maternity photos?
faqs.answer: Many clients prefer the second or early third trimester, when the bump shows clearly and movement is still comfortable. We will suggest timing during your free consultation.

faqs.question: Can my partner or children join?
faqs.answer: Yes. Family frames are a natural part of many maternity sessions — tell us who you want included when you enquire.

faqs.question: Do you travel outside Erode for maternity shoots?
faqs.answer: Yes. We shoot across Tamil Nadu, including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai. Studio sessions in Erode are also popular for controlled light and comfort.

faqs.question: How do packages work?
faqs.answer: See our Packages page or ask in consultation. Exact inclusions and pricing are confirmed at booking.

/baby-milestone-photography-erode.title: Baby Milestone Photography in Erode | Doll Pictures
/baby-milestone-photography-erode.description: Celebrate three-month, six-month and first-year milestones with baby photography in Erode — gentle sessions for families across Tamil Nadu.
/baby-milestone-photography-erode.heading: Baby milestone photography in Erode
/baby-milestone-photography-erode.body: Mark three-month, six-month and first-year milestones with joyful, gently paced baby sessions in Erode and across Tamil Nadu.
/baby-milestone-photography-erode.label: Milestones
/baby-milestone-photography-erode.lead: From early smiles to first steps, we capture the milestones that disappear too quickly — with patience, play and cinematic warmth.

sections.heading: Milestones worth remembering
paragraphs: Baby milestone sessions at DOLL PICTURES focus on personality as much as posing. We build in play, parent interaction and short breaks so your child stays comfortable.
Popular moments include early infant portraits, sitting milestones, and first-birthday lead-ups. Tell us the age and mood you want to celebrate and we will shape the session around it.

sections.heading: A calm, guided experience
paragraphs: We prepare simple sets and colour stories that suit your baby’s age. Parents stay involved — often the best frames are the ones where you are in the picture too.
Editing keeps skin soft and colours true. Delivery timelines and image counts follow the package you choose at booking.

sections.heading: Erode base, statewide families
paragraphs: Sessions are hosted primarily at our Erode studio on Perundurai Road. Families visit from across Tamil Nadu, including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai.
If you are combining a milestone session with a cake smash or family portrait, we can plan a single visit — ask during consultation.

faqs.question: Which milestones do you photograph?
faqs.answer: Common sessions include early infant portraits, sitting milestones and first-year celebrations. Share your baby’s age when you enquire and we will suggest a fit.

faqs.question: Can we combine milestone and cake smash?
faqs.answer: Often yes — many first-birthday plans include both. We will confirm timing and energy needs in consultation.

faqs.question: Do you only work in Erode?
faqs.answer: Our studio is in Erode; we also serve families across Tamil Nadu, including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai.

faqs.question: How do we book?
faqs.answer: Send your preferred dates via booking form or WhatsApp. The first consultation is free.

/cake-smash-photography-erode.title: Cake Smash Photography in Erode | Doll Pictures
/cake-smash-photography-erode.description: Fun, styled cake smash photography in Erode for first birthdays — messy joy, clean portraits and memories for families across Tamil Nadu.
/cake-smash-photography-erode.heading: Cake smash photography in Erode
/cake-smash-photography-erode.body: First-birthday cake smash sessions in Erode — playful setups, joyful mess and portraits your family will laugh over for years.
/cake-smash-photography-erode.label: Cake smash
/cake-smash-photography-erode.lead: One candle, one cake, endless expressions — we turn first-birthday chaos into a gallery full of joy.

sections.heading: Styled for fun, shot with care
paragraphs: Cake smash photography at DOLL PICTURES balances a styled set with room for real play. We plan colours and simple props, then let your toddler explore the cake at their own pace.
Clean portraits before the smash and joyful frames after give you both keepsake and personality shots in one session.

sections.heading: What to expect on the day
paragraphs: We brief you on clothing colours, cake timing and how to prepare your child. Sessions include breaks; we never force a smile or a smash.
After editing you receive a curated set of images. Print and album options can be discussed when you choose your package — details confirmed at booking.

sections.heading: Celebrate in Erode or travel to you
paragraphs: Most cake smash sessions happen in our Erode studio, where we control light, backdrop and cleanup. Families also join us from Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore, Chennai and across Tamil Nadu.
Planning a first birthday out of town? Mention travel early so we can check dates and logistics.

faqs.question: Do we bring the cake?
faqs.answer: Cake arrangements are confirmed during consultation so size, frosting and colours suit the set and your child. We will guide you on what works best.

faqs.question: What should my child wear?
faqs.answer: Simple outfits in soft colours photograph beautifully and leave room for the cake’s colour story. We share wardrobe tips before the session.

faqs.question: Do you shoot cake smash outside Erode?
faqs.answer: Yes — we serve families across Tamil Nadu, including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai. Studio sessions in Erode remain the most popular for controlled setups.

faqs.question: Can we add family portraits?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many parents add a short family set before the smash while outfits are still clean.

/family-photography-erode.title: Family Photography in Erode | Doll Pictures
/family-photography-erode.description: Warm, cinematic family photography in Erode — studio and outdoor sessions for parents, children and extended family across Tamil Nadu.
/family-photography-erode.heading: Family photography in Erode
/family-photography-erode.body: Warm family portraits in Erode — studio or outdoor sessions that feel natural for parents, children and the people you love most.
/family-photography-erode.label: Family
/family-photography-erode.lead: Real connection, soft direction and cinematic light — family sessions designed for laughter, closeness and frames you will actually display.

sections.heading: Portraits that feel like you
paragraphs: Family photography with DOLL PICTURES is guided but never stiff. We prompt natural interaction — walks, hugs, quiet looks — so every generation in the frame feels present.
Whether you want a classic studio set or an outdoor golden-hour story, we plan wardrobe colours and locations that photograph cohesively.

sections.heading: How sessions are planned
paragraphs: Your free consultation covers group size, ages of children, preferred mood and any must-have combinations (parents only, cousins, grandparents). On the day we keep pacing kind for little ones.
Edited galleries are delivered on the timeline shared at booking. Packages and print options are confirmed when you reserve your date.

sections.heading: From Erode to all of Tamil Nadu
paragraphs: Our home base is the Erode studio at URT TOWERS, Perundurai Road. We also photograph families across Tamil Nadu — including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai — when travel is arranged in advance.
Multi-generation gatherings and festival-season portraits are welcome; book early for peak dates.

faqs.question: How many people can join a family session?
faqs.answer: Small families and larger multi-generation groups are both welcome. Share headcount when you enquire so we can plan posing and timing.

faqs.question: Studio or outdoor — which is better?
faqs.answer: Studio offers controlled light and comfort; outdoor sessions add atmosphere. We will recommend based on ages, season and the look you want.

faqs.question: Do you travel outside Erode for family shoots?
faqs.answer: Yes. We shoot across Tamil Nadu, including Salem, Namakkal, Coimbatore and Chennai. Mention your preferred location in the booking note.

faqs.question: Is consultation free?
faqs.answer: Yes. The first consultation is free so you can book with clarity on style, logistics and package fit.
